textByHash.9f18de362d295ce82fee9fee88746852a53e0a55: Can you scratch my belly next? It's perfectly safe.
textByHash.065d6f2ece2e31d30de8e2f9503b9928d35c54c2: Are you not going to wind it up first? Come on now, put some effort in.
textByHash.98cfabe7827334230699f7bc6adca8df2d22373c: Do you mind? I'm trying to sleep here.
textByHash.f6aa786b8de4c17c7c6397d9a68e4adb29baa423: Well as much as I resent the trickery used, this bed is much comfier now.
textByHash.4cd4ab41d56e2c79d088b3bffd2337b9ee938c24: Ooh, thank you. Did you catch this yourself?
